In respect of temporary filling up, S.P.V. / 16-B. The rule of 07/05/2021

The government's decision The challenge has been filed in the High Court, Bombay and the final
The promotion is being made subject to the decision.
(2) Since the promotion is purely temporary in nature, the result of this temporary promotion shall be
Selected officers will not have any right to regularity and integrity of service.
(3) These promotions are being made subject to the approval of the Maharashtra Public Service Commission.
(4) The temporary promotion granted to such officers shall be after the date of the order against them.

(7) The above officers who have been appointed by promotion shall at the place of their new appointment forthwith
Be engaged. They should not go on leave unauthorisedly or submit a representation for change of posting /
Do not apply. In doing so, they are in violation of Rule 23 of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Conduct) Rules, 1979.
They should note that this will entitle them to disciplinary action.
(8) Director, Directorate of Vocational Education and Training, Maharashtra State, Mumbai by promotion
The appointed officers should be relieved immediately and present at the place of the new appointment immediately.
Suggestions should be made. Also, compliance with the appointment of the officer concerned to the position of promotion.
The report should be submitted to the government immediately.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
